---
title: "Freeze_Thaw_Dates_Ch2"
author: "Mirella Shaban"
date: "2026-01-21"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
#load nongapfilled data

#GITHUB ACCESS:
#filepath = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/shabanm2/Utqiagvik/main/Meteorological_Seasons_Data/"
#some issue occurred when merging everything together, using the seasonal files now until a proper merge can be conducted

#Desktop access
filepath = "/Users/shabangin/Desktop/UVA/RESEARCH/Barrow/ALL_COMBINED/Daily/"
  
summ22 <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "GroundTemperature_Summer2022_DAILY.csv"))
fall22 <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "GroundTemperature_Fall2022_DAILY.csv")) #for some reason there is only data for 09/01/2022 in this file??
summ23 <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "GroundTemperature_Summer2023_DAILY.csv"))
fall23 <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "GroundTemperature_Fall2023_DAILY.csv")) #for some reason there is only data for 09/01/2022 in this file??
summ24 <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "GroundTemperature_Summer2024_DAILY.csv"))
fall24 <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "GroundTemperature_Fall2024_DAILY.csv")) # regular fall data for entire season here
summ25 <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "GroundTemperature_Summer2025_DAILY.csv"))

summ22$Date <- as.POSIXct(summ22$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
fall22$Date <- as.POSIXct(fall22$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
summ23$Date <- as.POSIXct(summ23$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
fall23$Date <- as.POSIXct(fall23$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
summ24$Date <- as.POSIXct(summ24$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
fall24$Date <- as.POSIXct(fall24$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
summ25$Date <- as.POSIXct(summ25$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")

### *Freeze dates (after value passes 0) --> depends on season you look at*

```


#wait on fall 2023 -- see what went wrong in averaging and combining script***
```{r}
freeze_dates <- fall22 %>% filter(fullname == "SSMH-BASE" & avg < 0.5, depth =="90cm") %>% filter(Date > "2022-09-01" & Date < "2022-12-01")

list(freeze_dates)
```

### THAW (Summer)
```{r}
thaw_dates <- summ23 %>% filter( fullname == "BEO-B06" & avg > -0.6, depth == "90cm") %>% filter(Date > "2023-06-01" & Date < "2023-09-01")
list(thaw_dates)


x <- SUMM24_ALLDEPTHS %>% filter( fullname == "BEO-B08" & depth == "10cm") 
list(x)
```

FIGURE OF ALL STATIONS DURING YEAR = X VARIATION
```{r fig1, fig.height = 70, fig.width = 26}
VARIATION <- fall24 %>% filter( avg > -1 & avg < 1)

ggplot(VARIATION, aes(x= Date, y=avg)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title= "FALL 2024 THAW VARIATION", x = "Date", y="Ground Temperature (°C)")  +
  facet_wrap(depth~fullname,ncol=5,drop=FALSE)

#add facet wrapping here to tidy up figure
  
```

```{r fig2, fig.height = 30, fig.width = 20}
VARIATION <- SUMM24_ALLDEPTHS %>% filter(fullname == "TNHA-BASE", value > -1 & value < 1)

ggplot(VARIATION, aes(x= date, y=value)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title= "SUMMER 2024 THAW VARIATION - TNHA-BASE", x = "Date", y="Ground Temperature (°C)")  +
  facet_wrap(depth~fullname,nrow=5,drop=FALSE)
  
```
